revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 20 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:20 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 20 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:20 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 20 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:20 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 20 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:20 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4135887]])
revision.text:
{{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 20 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:20 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121244)
working on the date checking
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Removing from [[Category:Qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]][[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]][[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]][[id:20 Rabiulakhir]][[ms:20 Rabiulakhir]][[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]][[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]][[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rabi' al-Thani}}
'''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 20 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:20 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

'''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:20 ربيع الآخر]] [[ckb:٢٠ی ڕەبیعولئاخیر]] [[fa:۲۰ ربیع‌الثانی]] [[id:20 Rabiulakhir]] [[pnb:20 ربیع الثانی]] [[sd:20 ربيع الثاني]] [[ur:20 ربیع الثانی]] {{Islamic Calendar}} {{wikidata link|Q4121244}} [[Category:Days 20 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Thani]] [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]

'''Rabi' al-Thani 20''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 20th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Thani]].
